front: Explain the role of cytokine engineering in immunotherapy.
back: Cytokine engineering: fusion proteins (IL-2 muteins), targeted delivery (cytokine-antibody fusions), gene therapy. IL-15 superagonist (N-803) expands NK and T cells. Engineered IL-2 (bempegaldesleukin) preferentially activates T cells over Tregs. Cytokine release syndrome is a major toxicity.
